title: Comparative Democratic Resilience
further_info: Recommended Reading • Croissant, Aurel u. Jeffrey Haynes (eds.) 2021. Democratic Regressions in Asia. Special issue Democratization 28(1). • Croissant, Aurel und Lars Lott (2025). Democratic Resilience in the Twenty-First Century: Search for an Analytical Framework and Explorative Analysis. Political Studies, 0(0). https://doi.org/10.1177/00323217251345779 • Merkel, Wolfgang u. Anna Lührmann (eds.) 2021. Resilience of Democracies: Responses to Illiberal and Authoritarian Challenges. Democratization Special Issue 28(5). • Sika, Nadine u. Balázs Szent-Iványi (eds.) 2026. Fifty Years of the Third Wave: Democratization” for the journal is now very close to being publication-ready. Democratization Special Issue, forthcoming.
